subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O God of existence and Sovereign of the unseen and the seen! I beseech Thee by the Name whereby tranquility was bestowed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا اله الوجود و سلطان الغیب و الشهود اسئلک بالاسم الذی به اطمئنت
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for praise and gratitude
